item.title: 🥀 DENIER ~ our erotic salon co-hosted with @alicescope @haleyalbert in @officema...
item.description:
@mindyseu

🥀 DENIER ~ our erotic salon co-hosted with @alicescope @haleyalbert in @officemagazine — thank you @simonrasmussen @selenaaiyla !

TELL AN EROTIC STORY. YOU HAVE ONE MINUTE. EVERYONE MUST GET ON THE BED.

PHOTOS
1 - pic by @IsabellaBehravan + ty @pap3rpl4ne for syncing our blinks

2 - pic by @kobewagstaff — family photo with @mesmesmes8 @justinnporter @mayaontheinternet @fridacashflow @xiaolongbby @imanperson_studio @andrewthomashuang @yeahsnos @alicescope

3 - pic by @strange.victory (left) of @justinnporter @fridacashflow + pic by @stassievee (right) of @reihertzler

4 - pic by @strange.victory of @justinnporter @fridacashflow

5 - pic by @strange.victory of @norabermanofficial’s chokehold + @alima_lee

6 - pic by @cliffordusher of @zsela_ @alicescope

7 - pic by @ryanfutura of @halleta

8 - pic by @IsabellaBehravan of @endingsoon.world @jilsandals @lexdetonex

9 - pic by @stassievee of @strange.victory

10 - pic by @stassievee of @olivekimoto (top) @andrewthomashuang (bottom)

11 - pic by @stassievee of @fridacashflow @alima_lee

12 - pic by @IsabellaBehravan of me

13 - thank you to @la.saum for making the martini fridge a reality + our favorite NA cocktail @drinkghia

14 - pic by me, a modern Warhol factory, ft @justinnporter @mayaontheinternet @xiaolongbby @imanperson_studio @andrewthomashuang

15 - pic by @stassievee of @eileenonline_

16 - pic by @ryanfutura of @alicescope @haleyalbert ft. my grandmother’s armoire

17 - pic by @haleyalbert, the best wine in LA @@jumbotimewines

18 - pic by @sammysinsss of @alicescope @haleyalbert me

19 - pic by @stassievee of @haleyalbert

20 - ty @maimoun_store for this amazing skirt by @ravereviewclothes
item.content:encoded:
@mindyseu

🥀 DENIER ~ our erotic salon co-hosted with @alicescope @haleyalbert in @officemagazine — thank you @simonrasmussen @selenaaiyla !

TELL AN EROTIC STORY. YOU HAVE ONE MINUTE. EVERYONE MUST GET ON THE BED.

PHOTOS
1 - pic by @IsabellaBehravan + ty @pap3rpl4ne for syncing our blinks

2 - pic by @kobewagstaff — family photo with @mesmesmes8 @justinnporter @mayaontheinternet @fridacashflow @xiaolongbby @imanperson_studio @andrewthomashuang @yeahsnos @alicescope

3 - pic by @strange.victory (left) of @justinnporter @fridacashflow + pic by @stassievee (right) of @reihertzler

4 - pic by @strange.victory of @justinnporter @fridacashflow

5 - pic by @strange.victory of @norabermanofficial’s chokehold + @alima_lee

6 - pic by @cliffordusher of @zsela_ @alicescope

7 - pic by @ryanfutura of @halleta

8 - pic by @IsabellaBehravan of @endingsoon.world @jilsandals @lexdetonex

9 - pic by @stassievee of @strange.victory

10 - pic by @stassievee of @olivekimoto (top) @andrewthomashuang (bottom)

11 - pic by @stassievee of @fridacashflow @alima_lee

12 - pic by @IsabellaBehravan of me

13 - thank you to @la.saum for making the martini fridge a reality + our favorite NA cocktail @drinkghia

14 - pic by me, a modern Warhol factory, ft @justinnporter @mayaontheinternet @xiaolongbby @imanperson_studio @andrewthomashuang

15 - pic by @stassievee of @eileenonline_

16 - pic by @ryanfutura of @alicescope @haleyalbert ft. my grandmother’s armoire

17 - pic by @haleyalbert, the best wine in LA @@jumbotimewines

18 - pic by @sammysinsss of @alicescope @haleyalbert me

19 - pic by @stassievee of @haleyalbert

20 - ty @maimoun_store for this amazing skirt by @ravereviewclothes
item.author: mindyseu

item.title: A SEXUAL HISTORY OF THE INTERNET 💝 a little (big) black book ORDER NOW! 🔗 https:...
item.description:
@mindyseu

A SEXUAL HISTORY OF THE INTERNET 💝 a little (big) black book

ORDER NOW!  🔗 https://darkforest.metalabel.com/asexualhistoryoftheinternet
🔗 https://asexualhistoryoftheinternet.com/ (or use the link in bio)  700+ page artist book, no larger than your phone, published alongside the tour of the lecture performance A SEXUAL HISTORY OF THE INTERNET (see other post for tour details)  Published with The Dark Forest Collective on @metalabel__ Designer: @lauracoombs Editor: @meggmillerr
Lecture Formate Collaborator: @juliocorreaestrada Illustrator: @pang.ink Timecodes Scripting: @classnic Website Support: @broskoski Metalabel: @ystrickler @lenaimamura Printer: @dza.druck

This Instagram-Stories-as-Lecture format was first conceived of by @juliocorreaestrada in a course I was teaching at Yale School of Art. I further developed this format, in collaboration with Julio, for A SEXUAL HISTORY OF THE INTERNET.

Photography by @timschutsky, art direction by @lauracoombs
item.content:encoded:
@mindyseu

A SEXUAL HISTORY OF THE INTERNET 💝 a little (big) black book

ORDER NOW!  🔗 https://darkforest.metalabel.com/asexualhistoryoftheinternet
🔗 https://asexualhistoryoftheinternet.com/ (or use the link in bio)  700+ page artist book, no larger than your phone, published alongside the tour of the lecture performance A SEXUAL HISTORY OF THE INTERNET (see other post for tour details)  Published with The Dark Forest Collective on @metalabel__ Designer: @lauracoombs Editor: @meggmillerr
Lecture Formate Collaborator: @juliocorreaestrada Illustrator: @pang.ink Timecodes Scripting: @classnic Website Support: @broskoski Metalabel: @ystrickler @lenaimamura Printer: @dza.druck

This Instagram-Stories-as-Lecture format was first conceived of by @juliocorreaestrada in a course I was teaching at Yale School of Art. I further developed this format, in collaboration with Julio, for A SEXUAL HISTORY OF THE INTERNET.

Photography by @timschutsky, art direction by @lauracoombs
item.author: mindyseu

item.title: Craziest month of my life. THANK YOU ALL so much for the warm reception and for ...
item.description:
@mindyseu

Craziest month of my life. THANK YOU ALL so much for the warm reception and for hanging out with us all over Europe 🥹 Here are more pics from my last three weeks abroad

🔗 tour.cyberfeminismindex.com 🔗 for upcoming events and more documentation and @inventorypress or your local bookseller to order

1. London - @whitechapelgallery, pic by Fiona Hansen, thank you Richard and Jane

2. Ghent - In a former autopsy room @designmuseumgent x @kaskgraphicdesign with @vsacchetti and moderated by #annaluyten, thank you @saradebondt and Thomas

3. Amsterdam - 1am remote lecture for @antikythera_xyz in the kitchen at @carmen.amsterdam, thank you @benjaminbratton

4. Paris - @lafayetteanticipations beautifully moderated by @madeleine_planeixcrocker, pic by @chloemgde, thank you Nicolas

5. Zurich - #easylessoning with @isabel___seiffert, pic by Mario Nae, thank you @rolandfrueh @corinaneuenetc @studionoi @other_means

6. Berlin - @a.to.z.presents thank you @anjalutz_artbooks, pic by @jens_bauermeister

7. Amsterdam - @nike, pic by and thank you to the funniest person I know @morganruby_duh

8. Paris - @after.8.books with @shulea2, pic by @liararoux, thank you Antonia

9. Helsinki - @publicsfi with @a_n_n_i____e, so much thanks for the most thorough facilitation @hkaplinsky

10. St Gallen - @sitterwerk for the closing of the OK Computer exhibition, pic by @juerglehni, thank you @rolandfrueh and @barbara.biedermann
item.content:encoded:
@mindyseu

Craziest month of my life. THANK YOU ALL so much for the warm reception and for hanging out with us all over Europe 🥹 Here are more pics from my last three weeks abroad

🔗 tour.cyberfeminismindex.com 🔗 for upcoming events and more documentation and @inventorypress or your local bookseller to order

1. London - @whitechapelgallery, pic by Fiona Hansen, thank you Richard and Jane

2. Ghent - In a former autopsy room @designmuseumgent x @kaskgraphicdesign with @vsacchetti and moderated by #annaluyten, thank you @saradebondt and Thomas

3. Amsterdam - 1am remote lecture for @antikythera_xyz in the kitchen at @carmen.amsterdam, thank you @benjaminbratton

4. Paris - @lafayetteanticipations beautifully moderated by @madeleine_planeixcrocker, pic by @chloemgde, thank you Nicolas

5. Zurich - #easylessoning with @isabel___seiffert, pic by Mario Nae, thank you @rolandfrueh @corinaneuenetc @studionoi @other_means

6. Berlin - @a.to.z.presents thank you @anjalutz_artbooks, pic by @jens_bauermeister

7. Amsterdam - @nike, pic by and thank you to the funniest person I know @morganruby_duh

8. Paris - @after.8.books with @shulea2, pic by @liararoux, thank you Antonia

9. Helsinki - @publicsfi with @a_n_n_i____e, so much thanks for the most thorough facilitation @hkaplinsky

10. St Gallen - @sitterwerk for the closing of the OK Computer exhibition, pic by @juerglehni, thank you @rolandfrueh and @barbara.biedermann
item.author: mindyseu
